title: The Mysterious Island of Crete's Skalia

scenes.text: This hidden beach offers a surreal swim in crystal-clear waters.
This is Skalia, a hidden beach located in Crete, Greece.
The calm waters are perfect for snorkeling and exploring marine life.
And the surrounding cliffs create a breathtaking backdrop.
scenes.label: CLIFFSIDE SPLENDOR

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Skalia, Crete - Greece. A secluded beach offering crystal-clear waters and stunning coastal cliffs, perfect for a dreamy escape. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌊
